subcodes.first_line: We have taught you in the Tablets that which causeth the Concourse on High to rejoice. Blessed is he who followeth that which hath been enjoined upon him [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: قد علمناکم فی الالواح ما استفرح به الملا الاعلی طوبی لمن اتبع ما امر به من
subcodes.subjects: @exhortations and counsels, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @praise and encouragement, @thankfulness; gratitude, @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @station of the Manifestation of God
